ead.archdesc:
======= RMA04336Richard White papers16-4-4336Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections2B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:12:35 UTC.Describing Archives: A Content Standard >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Richard White papers
White, Richard N.
16-4-4336
3 cubic feet. 3 cubic feet.
circa 1961-2005. In English. 10452207
Scope and content
Collection contains course material, notes, articles, lecture notes, correspondence, publications.
Preferred Citation
Richard White papers, #16-4-4336. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Biographical / Historical
Professor of Civil Engineering. Born in 1933, White joined the faculty of Cornell University in 1961, the same year that he finished his Ph.D. He taught at Cornell until his retirement in 1999, serving as Director of Cornell's School of Civil and Environmental Engineering from 1978-1984. Even after his retirement, he remained active in CEE until 2005. He died in 2009.
Civil engineering. Cornell University. College of Civil Engineering Cornell University -- : Faculty.
